# Tomography

**Summary**: A geophysical imaging technique that uses traveltime data to create 3D models of the Earth's interior.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2025-kesumastuti|Kesumastuti, 2025]] used P-wave tomographic modeling to map subducting slabs in the Sulawesi region.

## Key Results and Findings

- The model successfully resolved structures down to a minimum scale of approximately 35 km, corresponding to station spacing. ([[2025-kesumastuti|Kesumastuti, 2025, p. 71]])
